elements.title: Nancy Chitera
elements.contents: ... that Nancy Chitera (pictured) leads a university whose commercial subsidiaries plan to manufacture tractors and commence gold mining in Malawi?

elements.title: Temezda
elements.contents: ... that an Ibadi mosque in Temezda, Libya, was originally a Byzantine church?

elements.title: We Are Charlie Kirk
elements.contents: ... that "We Are Charlie Kirk" was ranked as the worst song of 2025 by the magazine Paste?

elements.title: Stanley Kimmel
elements.contents: ... that writer and composer Stanley Kimmel survived the sinking of SS Antilles after it was attacked by a German submarine?

elements.title: Danquah Circle
elements.contents: ... that Danquah Circle was named in honor of J. B. Danquah, one of Ghana's Big Six?

elements.title: sailor tattoos
elements.contents: ... that sailors in Britain and its colonies used gunpowder to ink their sailor tattoos?

elements.title: a book about bird's eggs
elements.contents: ... that Tim Birkhead wrote a book about bird's eggs after watching a presenter spin an egg on television?

elements.title: chocolatieres
elements.contents: ... that chocolatieres were among the gifts brought by the 1686 Siamese embassy to France?
